positive: A symmetrical, central, highly stylized illustration of a bioluminescent forest scene. The composition features glowing abstract flora, stylized geometric mushrooms, and gentle forest silhouettes (deer, fox) interacting within a dense wood. The color palette utilizes deep midnight indigo and slate teal as the base, dramatically accented by vibrant electric cyan, glowing lime green, and soft neon yellow accents. The style should be a mix of fine line art, clean graphic silhouette work, and watercolor gradients, ensuring strong contrast and immediate visual impact. The artwork must appear seamless and highly scalable for apparel printing, emphasizing crisp edges and strong linework.
negative: blurry, noise, grainy, low quality, artifacts, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logos, cropped, extra limbs, badly drawn, bad anatomy, poor composition
